heading: National housing goal
label: 12701 National housing goal
text: The Congress affirms the national goal that every American family be able to afford a decent home in a suitable environment.
notes: Short Title of 2003 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–186, title I, § 101117 Stat. 2685Dec. 16, 2003“This title [amending part E of subchapter II of this chapter] may be cited as the ‘American Dream Downpayment Act’.”
